attr.title: Stardew Valley (Valleycore)
attr.desc: Valleycore brings arm64 compatibility to Stardew Valley and SMAPI! Play with mods!
attr.inst: Download the latest Linux (non-compat) version with `download_depot 413150 413153 6005910083361727734` or with GOG. Copy all game assets to `valleycore/gamedata`, then download ValleyCore from https://github.com/a9ix/ValleyCore/releases and add the `tar.gz` file to `ports/valleycore/`. Game will be patched on first run.
